creator: jbe@magnetkern.de
text:
There are more security implications of this issue, e.g. when /etc/passwd, /etc/group, ~/.ssh/authorized_keys etc. get modified while a snapshot exists. This can lead to people gaining access to files that they never were supposed to see.

Also see:

https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/91178/post-631660

and

https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/discussions/9028#discussioncomment-3331782
